fields.Name: Duplicate Resolution
fields.Description: Shared core reasoning instructions for intelligent duplicate detection. Given a source record + vector-surfaced candidate matches and their field deltas, decides Merge / NotDuplicate / Uncertain, strengthens or weakens the vector score, picks the surviving record and per-field survivor choices, and explains why. Used directly as the cheap single-shot 'Prompt' reasoning path AND wrapped by the Duplicate Resolution Agent for the 'Agent' path, so both modes share one instruction set.
